error_signature: Google sheet is empty, values not being written
title: Google Sheets not populated with values
symptom: The Google Sheets document remains empty after executing the workflow, despite the workflow running successfully and returning results.
not_this_if: Values are being written to the sheet but not visible
root_cause: The user was using the 'Document - Create' operation, which only creates a new document without populating it. To write data to the sheet, an additional operation to append rows is required.
fix_steps: Add an 'Append Row' node to the workflow
Configure the 'Values to Send' in the Append Row node
Run the workflow again to see values populated in the sheet
agent_instruction: Add an 'Append Row' node to your workflow to populate the Google Sheet.
